compiled_state.title: Add PREPLANNING_INTERACTIVE flag read at startup and inline branches at CPs 1-6 in preplanning SKILL.md
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Context

Story 12bf-521f: Wire PREPLANNING_INTERACTIVE through all 7 interactive checkpoints in preplanning.

This task implements the inline conditional branches in `plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/SKILL.md` for the 6 interactive checkpoints inside the preplanning skill (CP1–CP6). CP7 is handled separately in T3.

## Depends On

Task 241e-0fdf (RED tests) must exist before this task runs. Tests must be RED before modifying SKILL.md.

## Implementation

### Startup flag read (Phase 1 Step 1, before any checkpoint)

After reading config at startup, add:

```bash
PREPLANNING_INTERACTIVE=$(bash "$PLUGIN_SCRIPTS/read-config.sh" preplanning.interactive 2>/dev/null || echo 'true')
PREPLANNING_INTERACTIVE=$(echo "$PREPLANNING_INTERACTIVE" | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]')
```

### CP1 — No epic ID provided (Phase 1 Step 1)

Before AskUserQuestion for epic selection:

```
If PREPLANNING_INTERACTIVE=false and no epic-id arg: log INTERACTIVITY_DEFERRED: no epic-id provided — invoke with /dso:preplanning <epic-id> and exit with error.
```

### CP2 — Escalation policy (Phase 1 Step 1b)

Before AskUserQuestion for escalation policy:

```
If PREPLANNING_INTERACTIVE=false: use default escalation policy "Escalate when blocked" without prompting.
```

### CP3 — Scope clarification (Phase 1 Step 3)

Before "pause and ask" for scope clarification:

```
If PREPLANNING_INTERACTIVE=false: log INTERACTIVITY_DEFERRED: scope clarification required — re-run /dso:preplanning <epic-id> interactively and exit with error.
```

### CP4 — Reconciliation approval (Phase 1 Step 4)

Before AskUserQuestion for reconciliation/approval:

```
If PREPLANNING_INTERACTIVE=false: auto-apply reconciliation changes (skip confirmation). Add in_progress guard: if epic already in_progress, skip transition call.
```

### CP5 — Story dashboard (Phase 4 Step 3)

Before presenting story dashboard to user:

```
If PREPLANNING_INTERACTIVE=false: suppress dashboard presentation (continue silently).
```

### CP6 — Final approval (Phase 4 Step 5)

Before AskUserQuestion for final approval:

```
If PREPLANNING_INTERACTIVE=false: skip approval gate and proceed automatically.
```

## Acceptance Criteria

- `plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/SKILL.md` contains PREPLANNING_INTERACTIVE flag read at startup
- All 6 checkpoints (CP1-CP6) have inline conditional branches matching their non-interactive behavior
- Tests in 241e-0fdf test file pass GREEN after implementation

## testing_mode: RED
